Global Variable# kIMKLocateCandidatesAboveHint

macOS 10.5+

```
var kIMKLocateCandidatesAboveHint: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/inputmethodkit/kimklocatecandidatesabovehint#Discussion)

Place the candidates window above the start of the current text selection.
